name: K8s Pod Health (Typed Chain)
description: Typed-chain variant of K8s Pod Health Summary. Same audit (live openagentic_kubernetes MCP listing pods, flag unhealthy, LLM narrative, HTML report) but uses the typed processing primitives (filter_data + select_data) instead of JS-expression transforms — opens authoring to non-engineers.

meta.purpose: Audit pod health in a Kubernetes namespace using the typed-chain pattern. Demonstrates filter_data + select_data replacing JS-expression transforms so non-engineer authors can build the same flow by clicking fields instead of writing JavaScript.
how_it_works: 1. Lists every pod in the chosen namespace via openagentic_kubernetes.k8s_list_pods (live cluster).
2. extract_key pulls the pods array out of the upstream MCP-tool output via dot-path 'pods' — typed extraction, no JS.
3. filter_data keeps only pods where status != 'Running' — typed predicate, no JS.
4. select_data picks { name, namespace, status, restarts, ready } from each unhealthy pod — typed projection, no JS.

5. A single transform computes the namespace label + total + unhealthy_count + assembles the LLM prompt input (this step still uses transform because llm_completion needs an aggregate input, which is the one case where a JS expression is genuinely the right primitive).
6. The platform LLM writes a 3-bullet operator narrative naming the worst offenders.
8. webhook_response renders the final HTML report with the operator summary plus the typed unhealthy-pods table.
meta.expected_output: HTML report containing a 3-bullet operator summary at the top and a typed unhealthy-pods table underneath. Status code 200, Content-Type text/html. Functionally equivalent to k8s-pod-health-summary; visible difference is the intermediate primitives, not the rendered report.
meta.useful_when: Same scenarios as k8s-pod-health-summary (daily morning health check, oncall triage). Use this variant when a non-engineer needs to author or modify the predicate/projection without writing JavaScript in transform.
meta.note: Typed-chain variant of k8s-pod-health-summary. Shows filter_data + select_data replacing JS-expression transforms for non-engineer authoring. The single remaining transform aggregates fan-out state for the LLM prompt — the one case where a JS expression is genuinely the right primitive.

data.label: Select: name + namespace + status + restarts + ready

operations.value: {{ (() => { const rows = Array.isArray(input.input) ? input.input : (Array.isArray(input) ? input : []); for (const r of rows) { if (r && typeof r.namespace === 'string') return r.namespace; } return 'agentic-dev'; })() }}
{{ (() => { if (Array.isArray(input.input)) return input.input; if (Array.isArray(input)) return input; return []; })() }}
{{ (() => { const rows = Array.isArray(input.input) ? input.input : (Array.isArray(input) ? input : []); return rows.length; })() }}

{{ (() => { const rows = Array.isArray(input.input) ? input.input : (Array.isArray(input) ? input : []); if (rows.length === 0) return 'All pods Running — nothing to report.'; return rows.map(p => `${p.name||''}${p.namespace||''}${p.status||''}${p.ready||''}${p.restarts??''}`).join(''); })() }}

data.label: Summarize Findings
data.prompt:
Operator-facing 3-bullet summary of unhealthy Kubernetes pods in namespace {{input.namespace_label}}.

Unhealthy pods (JSON array, may be empty):
{{input.unhealthy_projected}}

Total unhealthy: {{input.unhealthy_count}}.

Output rules (MUST follow):
1. Start the response with a single `-` character — no preamble, no "Here is", no "The user wants", no thinking out loud.
2. Exactly 3 short bullets, each on its own line, each beginning with `-`.
3. Reference pod names verbatim when applicable.
4. If the unhealthy array is empty, state that all pods are healthy and recommend a routine future check.

operations.value: {{ (() => { const raw = String(input.content || ''); const lines = raw.split(/\r?\n/); let firstBulletIdx = -1; for (let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) { const t = lines[i].trim(); if (t.startsWith('-') || t.startsWith('•') || t.startsWith('*')) { firstBulletIdx = i; break; } } if (firstBulletIdx === -1) { return raw.trim(); } return lines.slice(firstBulletIdx).join('\n').trim(); })() }}

data.label: HTML Report
data.bodyTemplate:
K8s Pod Health Report — namespace {{steps.aggregate.namespace_label}} (typed chain)

Operator Summary

{{steps.clean_narrative.clean_content}}

Unhealthy Pods ({{steps.aggregate.unhealthy_count}})

{{steps.aggregate.rows_html}}
NameNamespaceStatusReadyRestarts
